title: Wim Hof vs Buteyko Breathing: RCT Evidence Side-by-Side (2026)
description: Wim Hof and Buteyko use opposite CO2 strategies — one deliberately purges it, the other deliberately preserves it. What the RCT literature actually shows for immune function, anxiety, asthma, and HRV.
seoTitle: Wim Hof vs Buteyko Breathing: RCT Evidence Compared (2026)
seoDescription: Wim Hof vs Buteyko breathing compared by RCT evidence for immune function, asthma, anxiety, and HRV. Opposite CO2 strategies, different evidence bases.
imageAlt: Split-panel retrofuturist image — hyperventilation waveform left, hypoventilation waveform right, both against a dark CRT portal background
